key_lesson: Surface web scanning finds DISCUSSION of fraud. Telegram API scanning finds actual fraud operations. These are fundamentally different intelligence sources.

examples: 437 betting channels deep scanned with phones/UPIs
15 medicine channels found (not yet deep scanned)
telegram_api_scanner.why: Reads actual messages inside channels. Finds real phones, UPIs, prices, drug names. IT Act 65B hashed at time of capture.

whois_lookup.why: Public ICANN database. No privacy violation.

examples: 148 marketplace listings with explicit keywords in title
serpapi_marketplace.why: Works when searching for explicit fraud keywords in product titles on marketplace sites. Does NOT work for general pharma fraud detection.

what_does_not_work.serpapi_pharma: Surface web does not index active pharma fraud. 856 results → 0 verified fraud sellers. Counterfeit pharma operates in private channels.
what_does_not_work.serpapi_mule_recruitment: Mule recruitment happens in private Telegram groups. Google indexes news articles about mule recruitment, not actual recruitment posts.
what_does_not_work.serpapi_xhelper: XHelper operates via closed Telegram distribution. Not findable via Google search.

tomorrow_priority.8am: Telegram rate limit resets — run medicine channel scan
tomorrow_priority.expected: Drug names, prices, phones, UPIs from 15 channels. If Sun Pharma brand found → email approved immediately.

email_ready_now.hdfc_bank: WAIT — need Telegram mule channel scan
email_ready_now.npci: WAIT — need verified mule network data

cineos_actual_moat: 1,114 channels with 30.5M reach already in database. Daily automated scan adding 30-50 channels per day. Connected fraud graph with 1,159 nodes, 142 edges. This is the real data advantage. It compounds every single day. No competitor can replicate 20 sessions of work overnight.
